what_it_does: Relaticle is an open-source Laravel CRM (Filament v5 + Livewire v4): companies, people, opportunities, tasks and notes with team-based multi-tenancy, per-tenant custom fields, a CSV import wizard, a Sanctum REST API, an AI chat assistant with credit billing and tool-call approvals, and an internal sysadmin panel.

role_credentials.source: create via factory + team invite when a member-scope journey needs it
create a Sanctum token via the app UI or factory during setup

volatile_note: Fields in volatile_fields are CACHED HINTS, not truth. Stage 0 (references/environment.md) MUST re-derive them from the running app (config(), route:list, seeders, herd) every run and overwrite this run's project-profile.json copy with the derived values. If a derived value contradicts this file, update THIS file too (self-heal) and bump cached_at.
